changeSet.author: P35036
changeSet.sql: create schema if not exists reporting_metrics;

rollback.sql: drop schema if exists reporting_metrics cascade;

changeSet.author: P35036
changeSet.comment: Adds table account metrics on schema reporting_metrics

rollback.sql: drop table if exists reporting_metrics.account_metrics cascade; drop sequence if exists reporting_metrics.account_metrics_seq;

changeSet.author: P35036
changeSet.comment: initial creation of processed account metrics event on schema reporting metrics

rollback.sql: drop table if exists reporting_metrics.processed_account_metrics_event cascade; drop sequence if exists reporting_metrics.processed_account_metrics_event_seq;

changeSet.author: P35036
changeSet.comment: initial creation of reporting metrics outbox on default schema

rollback.sql: drop table if exists "reporting_metrics_outbox" cascade; drop sequence if exists reporting_metrics_outbox_seq;
